messages.body: Thanks for confirming the cancellation. Please also make sure to remove Zoca’s access and setup from the following: -The services.allinonesalon.us domain where your app was deployed -Google Business Profile management -F…

messages.body: Zoca team, I wanted to let you know that October 31st will be the last day of our collaboration. We’ve tried for several months, but I honestly don’t see the value for the money I’ve been spending. The results haven’t ma…
